mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM video_comment vc INNER JOIN analysis_task at ON vc.task_id = at.task_id
at.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT AVG(CASE WHEN vc.sentiment_label = 'POSITIVE' THEN 1.0 WHEN vc.sentiment_label = 'NEGATIVE' THEN -1.0 ELSE 0 END) FROM video_comment vc INNER JOIN analysis_task at ON vc.task_id = at.task_id
at.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT vc.aspect, COUNT(*) as count FROM video_comment vc INNER JOIN analysis_task at ON vc.task_id = at.task_id WHERE vc.aspect IS NOT NULL AND vc.aspect != '' AND at.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY vc.aspect ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10
